open.title: Open Shipment Orders
open.description: Orders that have entered the temporary planning pool. DAT, entitlement return, and shipment stages are managed here as warehouse balance becomes available.

completed.title: Completed Shipment Orders
completed.description: Orders move here when the full order quantity has completed the entitlement DAT flow and shipment process.

hero.description: Plans batches from Netsis shipping orders up to available warehouse balance without creating shipment orders immediately. Ready quantities are traceable through outbound transfer, return, and shipment stages.

detail.title: {{order}} entitlement flow
detail.description: Order lines, allocated batch quantities, and related DAT/shipment stages.
detail.chooseBatch: Select a batch to see its steps.

transferPreview.title: DAT / shipment eligibility summary
transferPreview.description: Current status based on order quantity, processed quantity, remaining balance, and warehouse availability.

bulkTransferPreview.title: Entitlement transfer order preview
bulkTransferPreview.description: Review which open orders can receive entitlement transfer orders based on warehouse balance and remaining quantity before running the operation.
bulkTransferPreview.warning: When you run this operation, entitlement transfer flow starts only for eligible orders; skipped orders continue waiting for stock or balance conditions.
bulkTransferPreview.empty: No open entitlement order was found to preview.
bulkTransferPreview.error: Entitlement transfer preview could not be loaded.

table.willCreate: An entitlement transfer will be opened for {{qty}} quantity.
table.willSkip: This order will be skipped in this run.
table.willCreateLine: An entitlement transfer will be opened for {{qty}} quantity of {{stock}}.
table.willSkipLine: This line will be skipped in this run.

bulkShipmentPreview.title: Loading/shipment order preview
bulkShipmentPreview.description: Review which orders can receive loading/shipment orders based on ready-to-ship quantities before running the operation.
bulkShipmentPreview.warning: When you run this operation, loading/shipment orders are created only for ready orders; orders that are not ready or waiting for full shipment are skipped.
bulkShipmentPreview.empty: No ready-to-ship order was found to preview.
bulkShipmentPreview.error: Loading/shipment preview could not be loaded.

table.willCreate: A loading/shipment order will be opened for {{qty}} quantity.
table.willSkip: This order will be skipped in this run.
table.fullShipmentWaiting: This order waits for full shipment; shipment cannot be opened until the full remaining quantity is ready.
table.willCreateLine: A loading/shipment order will be opened for {{qty}} quantity of {{stock}}.
table.willSkipLine: This line is not ready to ship.

pendingOperations.error: Pending operations could not be loaded.
pendingOperations.searchPlaceholder: Search order, batch, customer or stock...

transfer.title: Pending Entitlement Transfers
transfer.description: Track batches waiting in entitlement outbound, intermediate approval, entitlement return, and replenishment DAT stages by order and stock line.

shipment.title: Pending Loading / Shipment Orders
shipment.description: Track batches that returned from entitlement or are directly ready to ship, including those waiting for loading/shipment orders or already opened shipment orders.

actions.WaitReplenishmentToOrderWarehouseComplet: Waiting replenishment to order warehouse completion

move.title: Move ready-to-ship quantity to another order
move.description: Move quantity to an open order line with the same stock/variant. If physical picking or ERP processing has started, the system blocks the move.
move.targetError: Target orders could not be loaded.
move.noTargets: No movable open order line was found for this stock/variant.
move.reasonPlaceholder: Example: customer priority changed, source order cancelled...
move.error: Move operation could not be completed.

validation.quantityRequired: Quantity to move must be greater than zero.

activity.title: Completed operations
activity.description: Document, ERP, and collection trace for related DAT, entitlement, return, and shipment stages.
activity.empty: There is no operation history for this order yet.
activity.emptyHakEdis: There is no entitlement/DAT movement for this order yet.
activity.emptyShipment: There is no shipment/loading movement for this order yet.
activity.createFromQueues: Create orders from the pending transfer and shipment/loading screens.
activity.readOnlyDetail: Read-only detail - no action starts here
activity.detailDescription: Shows who completed this step, when it was completed, and the related document/ERP trace.

messages.evaluationFailed: ERP orders could not be synced.
messages.batchFailed: Entitlement batch action could not be completed.
messages.transfersFailed: Suggested transfers could not be created.
messages.bulkTransfersCreated: Entitlement transfer operation completed. Transfers: {{transfers}}, advanced batches: {{advanced}}, waiting: {{skipped}}
messages.bulkTransfersFailed: Entitlement transfer orders could not be created.
messages.bulkShipmentsCreated: Loading/shipment operation completed. Shipments: {{shipments}}, advanced batches: {{advanced}}, waiting: {{skipped}}
messages.bulkShipmentsFailed: Loading/shipment orders could not be created.
messages.policyFailed: Entitlement order policy could not be updated.

hero.description: Manage the physical warehouse and shelf/cell where products return after entitlement is completed. The return DAT flow uses this single location as the target.

form.completedWarehouseDescription: Select the warehouse where completed entitlement products return and wait.
form.completedShelfDescription: Shelf/cell where completed entitlement products are placed after return DAT.
form.noShelves: No active shelf/cell was found for this warehouse.

table.title: Defined entitlement locations
table.empty: No entitlement location setting has been defined yet.

messages.saveFailed: Entitlement location setting could not be saved.
messages.deleteFailed: Entitlement location setting could not be deleted.

orderSummary.title: Order Summary Report
orderSummary.description: Track expected, entitlement outbound, entitlement return, and shipment waiting quantities per order in one operational view.
orderSummary.empty: No order summary record was found.
orderSummary.error: Order summary report could not be loaded.

hero.description: Manage operation code, description, type, and warehouse chain settings for DAT, shipment, and warehouse outbound flows in Bilginoglu entitlement.

form.warehouseSelectDescription: Select the warehouse used by this operation chain.

table.title: Defined operations
table.empty: No operation setting has been defined yet.

messages.saveFailed: Operation setting could not be saved.
messages.deleteFailed: Operation setting could not be deleted.
